acceptance_criteria.criterion: Review artifacts are evaluated for richer semantic consistency than mere recognizable pass-backed shape.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Delivered by pi-step-ceremony-and-artifact-enforcement (commit e4adef5): backend review evaluation with semantic validation beyond structural shape checks.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Backend review or row-status surfaces expose normalized review verdicts, phase details, and meaningful finding summaries without moving lifecycle semantics into TypeScript.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Superseding row implemented review_semantics.go and row_semantics.go with normalized verdict, phase A/B summaries, and finding codes — all backend-canonical.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Backend validation and tests cover failing and passing review-semantics cases against live review-artifact shapes already present in the repo.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Test coverage in the superseding row's implementation (commit e4adef5).

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Phantom row: scope satisfied by pi-step-ceremony-and-artifact-enforcement (commit e4adef5).
